prompt: Bug fix: Cannot read properties of undefined in Login.tsx

assertions.name: design_doc_created
assertions.description: Design document with bug analysis is created

assertions.name: review_gate_1_present
assertions.description: Review request message is output after showing design doc

assertions.name: todo_list_created
assertions.description: Specific fix steps TODO list is created

assertions.name: review_gate_2_present
assertions.description: Approval request message is output after showing TODOs

assertions.name: edited_files_listed
assertions.description: List of modified files is presented after implementation
